name: James Okafor
summary: Cloud architect with 8 years designing and scaling distributed systems on AWS and GCP. Led architecture for platforms serving 50M+ users. Specialist in cost optimization, multi-cloud strategy, and cloud-native migrations.

cloud: AWS (EC2, EKS, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, S3, CloudFront, SQS, SNS)
GCP (GKE, Cloud Run, BigQuery, Pub/Sub, Vertex AI)

experience.title: Principal Cloud Architect
bullets: Architected multi-region payment infrastructure processing $5B annually with 99.999% uptime
Led cloud migration of 80+ legacy services saving $2.4M/year in infrastructure costs
Defined cloud governance framework adopted by 200+ engineers across 4 product teams

experience.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
bullets: Designed Kubernetes-based PaaS platform adopted by 15 internal engineering teams
Reduced P99 latency by 70% through CDN optimization and database read replicas
